title: RH-EML: Generalized Riemann Hypotheses

dedekind.object: Dedekind zeta ζ_K(s) for number field K

grh_eml.verdict: GRH for ζ_K: same EML-3 structure as Riemann ζ ✓

field_extension.extension: K/Q: Galois group action = EML-2 (measurement) ⊗ ζ_K(EML-3) = ∞
field_extension.insight: Ramified primes introduce cross-type; zeros remain EML-3

selberg_axioms.analytic_continuation: entire or pole at s=1: EML-3 (oscillatory continuation)

grh_selberg.zeros: all zeros on Re=1/2: ET=3 for all L∈S
grh_selberg.structure: Selberg class GRH = EML-3 universality theorem
grh_selberg.verdict: Every L∈S has shadow=3; GRH = shadow universality for S

artin.object: Artin L-functions L(s,ρ) for Galois representations ρ
artin.why: L(s,ρ) = Π_p det(1-ρ(Frob_p)p^{-s})^{-1}: eigenvalues of ρ = roots of unity = EML-3

depth_analysis.galois_rep: ρ: Gal(K̄/Q) → GL(n,C): image = compact Lie group = EML-3
depth_analysis.frobenius: Frob_p eigenvalues = algebraic integers of modulus 1: EML-3

langlands_connection.artin_conj: L(s,ρ) = L(s,π) for automorphic π: EML-3 = EML-3

ramanujan_conjecture.insight: Ramanujan = constraint that keeps amplitude at EML-2 (no EML-∞ blowup)

langlands_grh.verdict: GL(n)-GRH: EML-3 structure for all n ✓

verdicts.GRH_universality: All GRH instances = EML-3 stratum universality
verdicts.selberg_class: GRH for Selberg class = shadow=3 for all L∈S
verdicts.gl_n: GL(n)-GRH: EML-3 for all ranks n
verdicts.new_result: GRH = EML-3 universality theorem: all natural L-functions have shadow=3

key_theorem: GRH-EML Universality Theorem (S321): All generalized Riemann hypotheses — Dedekind ζ_K, Selberg class, Artin, GL(n) — share the same EML-3 structure. GRH = EML-3 universality theorem: every natural L-function has shadow=3. NEW: GRH for Selberg class = shadow universality for S: every L∈S has shadow=3. Artin L-functions: Galois(EML-3)↔Automorphic(EML-3): 3⊗3=3 (Langlands confirmed). GL(n)-GRH: EML-3 for all ranks n. The EML-3 structure is a UNIVERSAL SIGNATURE of all L-functions: GRH ↔ shadow=3 universality across the entire Selberg class.
rabbit_hole_log: Dedekind ζ_K: EML-3 (same structure as Riemann ζ)
Selberg class GRH: shadow=3 universality theorem
NEW: GRH = EML-3 universality: all L-functions share shadow=3
